title: Procurement Assistant - Education Sector (Up to $2500) #NKA
description:
Location: Tampines (Might have occasional travel to Dover Campus)

Duration: 5 months contract

Working Hours: 7.45am to 4.45pm (Mondays to Fridays)

Salary: Up to $2500

Job Responsibilities:
Reporting to the Procurement Assistant Manager/Manager, the Procurement Assistant [Temporary] will collaborate with team members to secure compliant and cost-effective outcomes for the College, and assist with general administrative duties. The role is based at the East campus, with occasional travel to Dover Campus (around 2 bus stops from Dover MRT) as required. 

  • Assist with Procurement Tender function - Such as scheduling project meetings during the tender stage, site show rounds, tender clarifications, seamless information collaboration between internal and external stakeholders, tender closing and generating management reports for approval.
  • Develop strong relationships and build trust with stakeholders in the College to understand business needs to build solutions to manage purchases; Assist in resolving supply, quality, service, and invoicing issues between Suppliers and internal stakeholders
  • Assist and guide requestors to ensure that all requirements and scope of works are clearly defined before sourcing from the market
  • Assist with the preparation of ad hoc tender and administrative paperwork (e.g. Drafting of Invitation to tender, preparing letter of award, etc.) and ensuring Supplier’s compliance with all relevant College policies and declarations.
  • Assist with any other duties, tasks or jobs with similar levels of responsibility and complexity to the assigned job grade as may be reasonably requested by the line manager and/or the College.


Job Requirements:

  • Minimum Diploma in Finance/Business


Ally
The Outsourcing Team
Recruit Express Pte Ltd
EA: 99C4599

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
